summary: Base W7 — prescribed ~19 mpw, polarized ~85% Z1. SWAP this week (athlete call 6/2): Tue ↔ Wed flipped — Hyp A pulled to Tue, threshold 3×8 @ T + MHR-retest finisher pushed to Wed. Mon + Tue DONE. Tue Hyp A: Incline BB 145 bump MISSED (set 1 hit 5 reps but to failure; §5 miss #1 → repeat 145 next Wed, two misses cuts the TM; AMRAP/TM re-test ~W8 deload), DB lat jumped 25→30 clean (no 27.5 DB available), preacher 55 hold cleared → bump 60 next, cable crunch 65→70 clean → 75 next, tri pushdown 55 hold persists (set 3 still failure). PROGRAM CHANGE: soleus wall-sit PERMANENTLY RETIRED per athlete directive (program.md updated; Adj #52). FLAGS: (1) Run-MHR retest travels with the run to Wed (Adj #45) — capture peak HR off a max-effort finisher after the 3×8 T work; treat as a floor (end-of-session fatigue may cap it); if ≥195–205, recompute Z2/Z3 per Adj #9. (2) Calf 335 stays held until an AM-clean Achilles read (Adj #40, Sat item); hold mileage while the Achilles settles. (3) Hill strides still owed — earliest debut W9 Mon (W8 is a deload, Adj #44). Sat Hyp B: lat → 150 (Adj #35), chest-supp row 85 reassess (Adj #36), cable lat capped 17.5 (Adj #37), tri 55 hold (Adj #50), preacher → 60 (Adj #49), seated calf 325 / 335 HELD (Adj #40), hanging SLR add load (Adj #41). Shoe: Vomero for long/easy, Zoom Fly 6 short tempo only while Achilles reactive (Adj #34). Accutane tendon risk persists (§11.E).

days.note: Logged — Z1 easy 35 min @ 10:36/mi, HR 157, cadence 166, treadmill, Vomero Plus; SI + Achilles clean (first non-reactive Achilles read since the flare). First work set only (strides/recovery omitted per athlete). Held under the prescribed 40 (mileage hold). Hill strides HELD — earliest debut now W9 Mon (W8 deload, Adj #44).

days.session: Hypertrophy A (lift, no run) — swapped from Wed
days.note: Logged — Incline BB 145 bump MISSED (145×5/4 RIR 0/0, 140×4 RIR 0 → repeat 145 next Wed, §5 miss #1, Adj #47); DB lat 25→30 clean, no 27.5 DB (Adj #48); preacher 55 hold cleared → bump 60 (Adj #49); cable crunch 65→70 clean → 75 (Adj #51); tri pushdown 55 hold persists, set 3 still failure (Adj #50); rear-delt 125 holding. Soleus wall-sit PERMANENTLY RETIRED (Adj #52).

days.session: Threshold 3×8 min @ T (90 s rec) + MHR retest finisher — run only, swapped from Tue
days.note: SWAP: threshold pushed Tue → Wed. §4.C W7, longer reps (3×8 vs W6's 5×5). Hold 8:00/mi (locked T pace, Adj #26); anchor RPE/pace not HR (Adj #9). RUN-MHR RETEST FOLDED IN (Adj #45): after the 3×8 T work + ~3–5 min easy jog, finish with a max-HR effort — treadmill 1%, ~2–3 min progressive build, last 30–60 s flat-out — capture peak HR. Treat the peak as a FLOOR (end-of-session fatigue may cap it); if ≥195–205, recompute Z2/Z3 per Adj #9. Zoom Fly 6 OK for this short tempo if Achilles tolerates.
§4.C W7 Thu midweek recovery (revert to rest on yellow/red mornings, §11.C). Vomero, flat, honest Z1 floor — no creep. Hold mileage if Achilles still reactive.
§4.C W7 Fri. Flat strides, cadence cap ≤180 spm (Adj #25). Anchor pace/RPE not HR (Adj #9). Shoe per Achilles status (Vomero if easy-dominant).

days.session: Long Z1 60 min AM + Hyp B PM (≥6h gap)
days.note: §4.C W7 Sat long (60 min prescribed; trim if Achilles reactive). Hyp B bumps/holds: lat → 150 (Adj #35), chest-supp row 85 reassess under fresher conditions (Adj #36), cable lat capped 17.5 (Adj #37), tri 55 hold (Adj #50), preacher → 60 (Adj #49), seated calf 325 — 335 bump HELD until Achilles AM-clean (Adj #40), hanging SLR add load/progress (Adj #41). Soleus wall-sit retired (Adj #52) — no longer in the circuit.
Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily SI prehab. Walking fine. Achilles AM check if still reactive.
